text: I've reached out multiple times about this ongoing issue with my order and I'm really frustrated. It feels like no one is taking it seriously. I just want a resolution, not excuses.
hey, i was trying to figure out if my account is still active? like, i got a bunch of alerts but not sure what they mean. can u help?
So, I tried accessing the app, and it’s telling me my account doesn’t exist, but I can see my past orders. What’s up with that? It’s super weird.
I saw something online about my account? Not sure. Can you help with that?
Could you please provide more information on whether there are any plans to release an on-premises version of your software? I've heard different things and would appreciate clarification.

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction regarding the recent experience I had with your service. Unfortunately, it did not meet the standards I expected. Please address this concern at your earliest convenience.
Hey, I'm really frustrated with how my order was handled. I received the wrong item and getting a response from support is taking forever. It's just not right, you know?
I seem to be having an issue where I can’t access my account, can you help me understand what might be going wrong?

I've reached out multiple times, and every time it's been a different response! This has been incredibly frustrating, and I feel like I'm not being heard. It’s not just about the refund; it's about the principle of good service. Please sort this out before I escalate it further!

Hey, so I was just wandering if you guys have any info on when the new features will be rolled out? I've seen some buzz about it but no official word, you know? Just curious if it's something we should be looking forward to or if it's still a while away.
My app crashes when I try to log in, not sure why.

I've been feeling so stressed since I noticed my account's been hacked! I can't believe someone changed my password, and I feel really anxious that they might have access to my personal information. Please help me get my account back! It's such a nightmare for me right now.

I would like to inquire about the process for accessing my account if I no longer have access to the recovery email I provided during registration. Additionally, are there alternative methods in case of such an issue?
hey, I keep trying to log in but it says my accnt is locked or somthin. i just really need to get in!
I can’t log in, but I also don’t remember my password. Can you help me reset it?
Quick question, is there any chance I can get my hands on a local backup solution? I know you guys mostly do cloud stuff but it would be great to have options.
